name: Ajeer
description: Developer of a digital facilities platform designed for providing home maintenance services. The company's platform offers a wide range of services for all home maintenance needs while keeping up with current trends and finding continuous areas of innovative approaches and improvements, enabling customers to access technicians in an on-demand model.

name: Appgain
description: Developer of a mobile marketing and customer engagement platform designed for customer lifecycle management. The company platform helps marketers from different industries to overcome the challenges they face by using smart solutions like deep links, mobile landing pages, notifications, and retargeting, enabling brands to get more users and improve engagement in one single platform.

name: bith.tv
description: Developer of a video editor platform designed to promote gaming content. The company's platform provides a game arena, and a medium for content creators to showcase their talent through clip-sharing by offering them easy-to-use video editing and social media distribution tools, enabling content creators to create and edit their content to formats suitable for various social media platforms.

name: Bondai
description: Provider of travel arrangement services intended to connect multiple service providers and enhance the tourism ecosystem. The company's services allow users to create a group, choose a destination, invite friends, explore accommodations, as well as find and compare flights, enabling consumers to better manage their trips through frequent and faster bookings, while providing a variety of options for the experience-seeking customer.

name: Coveti
description: Operator of an online fashion marketplace intended to cater to men and women. The company offers includes women's fashion, men's fashion, and accessories and specializes in offering designs from emerging designers, enabling independent fashion designers to produce on-demand garments and users to enjoy customized apparel.

name: Johrh
description: Operator of an online abaya store intended to serve in GCC selling a wide range of clothes. The company offers good quality materials of abayas in different fabrics and can order as per size requirements, enabling customers to access an online destination for abayas at affordable prices.

name: Tammwel
description: Developer of a loan comparison platform intended to help customers and clients find financial offers. The company's platform offers quotes for financing automobiles, real estate, and personal loans and also features tools for tracking loan reimbursement and payments, enabling loan seekers to connect with commercial loan providers.

name: Wuilt
description: Operator of a website-building portal intended to help users create professional websites. The company gives them more control over their brand and customer experience and allows brands to create their own custom online store without having to worry about the technical aspects of running an e-commerce business, enabling users to take the hassle out of web design and build their own websites.

name: Circle for Programming Electronic Applications
description: Developer of a property management software designed for real estate managers to save time. The company's software offers control over tenants' requests and enhances their living experience, lead a team with a productive flow, better manage the resources and cut the operational cost, manage all salesforce appointments with flexible calendar displays and layouts, enabling property managers to engage with their clients in an efficient manner, handle their requests effectively and reduce the overall operational costs.

name: Bankiom
description: Developer of a financial platform dedicated to providing a hassle-free banking experience. The company's platform offers digital banking and money management services, loan approvals as well as unparalleled customer support, enabling customers to organize their finances in a simplified manner.
